name: rn-vite-sample
//: Exact pins because Nodepod's installer ignores the lockfile and can't resolve ranges against a version list. flow-parser: jscodeshift requests "0.*", which Nodepod can't enumerate. vite: "^7.3.1" floats to latest (8.x), and Vite 8 bundles rolldown whose Nodepod wasm binding is the threaded (SharedArrayBuffer) variant, which crashes under enableSharedArrayBuffer:false. 7.3.6 is the last pre-rolldown Vite (rollup + esbuild). resolutions=yarn, overrides=npm.
